overview: GYNEA 3 GYNECOLOGY TABLE, 3 MOTORS 3 motors Suitable for Gynecological examinations Electronic adjustments of backrest, height, Trendelenburg and reverse Trendelenburg functions by hand control unit Anti-microbial, water proof, flame retardant, air permeable and easy cleanable mattress Removable stainless steel fluid basin Lockable, Removable and Adjustable Polyurethane Leg Supports (with belt), Strain Handle ABS covered back of table ABS covered sub-frame Stainless steel accessory rails Electrostatic powder coated metal frame Paper roll support at backrest Removable and adjustable armrest Removable foot extension Removable and adjustable headrest
